text.title: Personas Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from observable signals to a rule-grounded conclusion.

conclusion.verdict: cluster on goals + behaviours; draft 3-5 primary personas
run more interviews; use PROTO-personas for kickoff only
use stakeholder map instead of personas

example.trace: 8 interviews → cluster on goals + behaviours → 3 primary personas with quotes + scenarios + JTBD

text.example: Trace through the tree producing the leaf conclusion.
